# Memories by Lee Travels

> Tanzania's premier luxury travel agency. We craft bespoke honeymoon packages, corporate travel, private charters, and unforgettable journeys. Led by CEO Hellen Rhobi with 10+ years of aviation expertise.

## About

Memories by Lee Travels is a Tanzanian luxury travel agency based in Dar es Salaam (Kijitonyama / Polisi Mabatini). Founded by Hellen Rhobi, a travel specialist with over 10 years in the aviation industry, the agency delivers personalised, high-end travel experiences for couples, families, and corporate clients.

## Services

- Flight bookings (domestic and international)
- Bespoke honeymoon packages
- Corporate and group travel
- Private charter flights
- VIP ground transfer services
- Luxury hotel and resort stays

## Top Destinations

- Zanzibar, Tanzania — pristine beaches, Stone Town, Indian Ocean
- Serengeti, Tanzania — Great Migration, Big Five, luxury tented camps
- Mafia Island, Tanzania — secluded beaches, whale shark diving, boutique resorts
- Mikumi National Park, Tanzania — elephant herds, open floodplains
- Dubai, UAE — iconic skyline, desert safari, luxury shopping
- Turkey — Cappadocia, hot air balloons, Mediterranean coast
- Bali, Indonesia — rice terraces, private pool villas, wellness retreats
- South Africa — private game reserves, Cape Town, winelands
